value.0: Strange runes and pictographs, likely arcane in nature, have been scorched into the sides of this hide-covered strongbox.
Metals studs poke through the woodwork of this ornate chest. Judging by the fine craftsmanship, this strongbox appears to have been intended for public display.

Low and flat, this chest seems to have been designed for the storage and filing of a merchant's accounts.

This is the blade used be the Black Guard Scyllua Darkhope.

Once lawful paladin of Tyr who was tricked by Orgauth a Pit Fiend in disguise and fell from grace... Now she serves under him as his champion.

This is one of the Two scimitars used by Drizzt Do'Urden.

Icing Death is his frost blade.

This mace was made in order to help it's weilder deal with Constructs.

Also it has an added ability to be also effective against outsiders.

This bow is enchanted in order to help protect it's weilder vs elemental attacks of Fire and Cold.

Also it grants it's weilder the ability to cast haste once a day.
